subcodes.first_line: The holy melodies of the spirit require a new ear, and the sanctified breathings of Paradise need an exalted heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نغمات قدس معنویرا گوشی جدید باید و نفحات روح فردوسی را فوادی منیع شاید
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @creation of the world, @power of love
